---
title: "05. 刚健与突破"
subtitle: "Strength, Power, and Forceful Advance"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 5
categories: [i-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How high-yang Heaven-dominant hexagrams map excessive force, instability, and necessary rebalancing onto fold dynamics, fibers, and No11 violation."
---

**Hexagrams:** 小畜(9), 履(10), 同人(13), 大有(14), 无妄(25), 大畜(26), 大壮(34), 夬(43)  
**Omega Directions:** `fold operator`, `fiber structure`, `golden-mean shift`

{{< include articles/category_05_strength_power_forceful_advance.md >}}

---

[Back to I Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)


## Infographic

![category_05_strength_power_forceful_advance Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_05_strength_power_forceful_advance_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_05_strength_power_forceful_advance_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_05_strength_power_forceful_advance_infographic.png)
